Bash(git add src/lib/public-chat-tools.ts src/app/api/chat/route.ts && git commit -m "Public chat: add list_regular_activities tool for non-bookable events

Regular activities \(Lauftreff, Nordic Walking, Ski-Gymnastics etc.\) are
stored as non-bookable events with a fixed past startDate, so they never
appeared in list_upcoming_events \(which filters gte: now\). New tool
fetches all bookable=false events with no date filter. System prompt
instructs the bot to use it when asked about fitness/regular offerings.")

Bash(git add src/app/api/chat/route.ts && git commit -m "Public chat: render all event items as ICON_EVENT [Title]\(url\) hyperlinks

Both bookable events and regular activities must now be output as
'ICON_EVENT [Title]\(url\)' — the icon token triggers the Material Symbol
in the chat renderer, and the Markdown link makes the title clickable.")

Bash(git add src/components/PublicChatPanel.tsx && git commit -m "Fix ICON_EVENT link rendering: capture icon+link as single regex token

The split regex was breaking 'ICON_EVENT [Title]\(url\)' into separate
tokens, leaving a leading space on the link part that prevented the
link regex from matching. New pattern captures 'ICON_EVENT [Title]\(url\)'
as one token and renders the icon + clickable link together.")
